scripts.predev:fixture: npm run clean:notion-assets && npm run prepare:fixture-media
scripts.prebuild:fixture: npm run clean:notion-assets && npm run prepare:fixture-media
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run build:fixture && node --test tests/*.test.mjs && npm run verify:dist
scripts.deploy: npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:dist && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name wenren-home --branch main --env-file .env
